script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== aixa: stat + read cred now (master is 0640 azureuser:azureuser, aixa in group) ==='
runuser -u aixa -- stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -6
echo '--- read attempt ---'
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 50 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '=== aixa: live claude CLI test with full output capture ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo "say one word" | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text > /tmp/aixa_out 2>/tmp/aixa_err; echo rc=$?; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 200 /tmp/aixa_out; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 200 /tmp/aixa_err'
echo '=== aixa /home/aixa/.claude perms ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/aixa /home/aixa/.claude /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '===END==='
